Burnol Cream 20g.overview: India's iconic burn remedy cream containing an aminacrine antiseptic and cetrimide surfactant for first aid treatment of minor burns, scalds, and abrasions. Provides antiseptic coverage to prevent wound infection while cooling and soothing the burn area.
Burnol Cream 20g.howToUse: For minor burns: cool the burn under running cold water for 10–15 minutes first. Apply Burnol cream thinly to the cooled burn. Cover with a clean dressing. Reapply 2–3 times daily. Do not apply to large or severe burns — seek emergency care.
warnings: Not for severe burns — medical emergency
Do not use on infected wounds
Cool burn with water first — do not apply cream directly to fresh burn without cooling

Metronidazole 400mg.overview: Nitroimidazole antibiotic and antiprotozoal agent effective against anaerobic bacterial infections and protozoal infections including amoebiasis, giardiasis, bacterial vaginosis, and dental infections. Essential medicine for treating serious anaerobic infections.
Metronidazole 400mg.dosage: Bacterial infections: 400mg three times daily for 5–7 days. Amoebiasis: 400–800mg three times daily for 5–10 days. Take with food to reduce nausea.
sideEffects: Peripheral neuropathy with very long-term use
warnings: Strict avoidance of alcohol during and 48 hours after treatment — severe disulfiram-like reaction
Do not use in first trimester of pregnancy

chemistry.structureInfo: Metronidazole is a prodrug selectively activated by anaerobic organisms through nitro-group reduction by ferredoxin-linked redox proteins. The active radical intermediate creates DNA strand breaks and inhibits nucleic acid synthesis, causing cell death. Aerobic organisms lack the low-redox proteins needed for activation — explaining the drug's selectivity for anaerobes.
chemistry.formationInfo: Synthesized from 2-methylimidazole through sequential nitration and N-alkylation with ethylene oxide. The relatively simple structure allows inexpensive production, contributing to its widespread availability as an essential medicine. First synthesized at Rhône-Poulenc in France in 1959.

Whisper Ultra Sanitary Pads 15s.overview: Ultra-thin sanitary pads with 3-in-1 protection — absorbs fluid, prevents leakage, and neutralizes odor. The XL size with side wings provides overnight and heavy-flow protection with the Air-Fresh technology that keeps skin feeling dry and comfortable.
Whisper Ultra Sanitary Pads 15s.instructions: 1. Wash hands before use. 2. Remove paper backing from adhesive strip. 3. Press firmly onto the center of clean underwear, adhesive side down. 4. Fold and press side wings under the underwear. 5. Change pad every 4–8 hours or when soaked, whichever is sooner. 6. Wrap used pad and dispose in a bin — do not flush.
warnings: Change pads regularly to prevent bacterial growth and infection
Do not flush — use waste bins only
Discontinue use if skin irritation develops

Koflet Herbal Cough Syrup.overview: Himalaya's Ayurvedic cough syrup combining multiple herbal ingredients traditionally used in Indian medicine for cough, sore throat, and upper respiratory infections. Provides soothing relief for both dry and productive cough without causing drowsiness.
Koflet Herbal Cough Syrup.dosage: Adults: 2 teaspoons (10ml) three times daily. Children (5–12 years): 1 teaspoon (5ml) three times daily. Children under 5: as directed by physician. Shake well before use.
sideEffects: Generally well tolerated with no significant adverse effects reported
ingredients: Vasaka (Malabar Nut — Adhatoda vasica) leaf extract

Budecort 0.5mg Respules.overview: Inhaled corticosteroid nebulizer solution for the maintenance treatment and prevention of asthma and croup in infants and children, and COPD in adults who cannot use inhalers effectively. Administered via a nebulizer machine for direct anti-inflammatory action in the airways.
Budecort 0.5mg Respules.dosage: Asthma in children: 0.5–1mg per nebulization, once or twice daily. Adults (COPD): 1–2mg twice daily. Must be used with a nebulizer machine. Duration as prescribed by physician.
sideEffects: Oral thrush (rinse mouth and face after use)
Rare adrenal suppression with high doses long-term
warnings: Rinse face and mouth with water after every nebulization to prevent oral thrush
Not for acute asthma attacks — use bronchodilator first
Discontinue gradually if long-term use — do not stop abruptly

chemistry.bioavailability: 6–10% systemically (most is deposited in airway, acting locally)
chemistry.structureInfo: Budesonide binds glucocorticoid receptors with high affinity and lipophilicity, allowing deep lung tissue penetration and prolonged local retention. It suppresses airway inflammation by inhibiting NF-κB transcription, reducing production of cytokines, chemokines, and inflammatory cell recruitment to the bronchial mucosa.
chemistry.formationInfo: Synthesized from hydrocortisone acetate through multi-step steroid modification including introduction of 16α,17α-acetal with butyraldehyde. Nebulizer suspension prepared in isotonic saline at precisely controlled particle size for optimal aerosol generation by jet and ultrasonic nebulizers.

Gabapentin 300mg.overview: Anticonvulsant and analgesic used for neuropathic pain conditions including diabetic peripheral neuropathy, post-herpetic neuralgia, and as an adjunct in epilepsy. Also used for restless leg syndrome and as an off-label treatment for anxiety.
Gabapentin 300mg.dosage: Start at 300mg once daily on day 1, increase to 300mg twice daily on day 2, and 300mg three times daily on day 3. Maintenance: 900–1800mg daily in divided doses. Do not stop abruptly.
warnings: Do not stop suddenly — taper under medical supervision
Avoid driving or machinery until you know how it affects you
Monitor for suicidal ideation (FDA black box warning for antiepileptics)

chemistry.bioavailability: 27–60% (oral, inversely proportional to dose due to saturable absorption)
chemistry.structureInfo: Gabapentin is structurally related to GABA but does not act on GABA receptors. It binds the α2δ-1 subunit of voltage-gated calcium channels in the CNS, reducing calcium influx at presynaptic nerve terminals and decreasing release of excitatory neurotransmitters including glutamate, norepinephrine, and substance P.
chemistry.formationInfo: Synthesized from cyclohexanone through Strecker synthesis to introduce the aminomethyl group, followed by reduction and hydrolysis to yield the final acetic acid structure. Originally designed as a lipophilic GABA analog that could cross the blood-brain barrier, though its ultimate mechanism of action proved different from GABA receptor modulation.

Losartan 50mg.overview: Angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB) for treatment of hypertension, heart failure, and diabetic nephropathy. Losartan was the first ARB approved for clinical use and offers an excellent safety profile, particularly suitable for patients who develop a dry cough with ACE inhibitors.
Losartan 50mg.dosage: 50mg once daily. Dose can be increased to 100mg once daily if needed. Take at the same time each day with or without food.
warnings: Do not use during pregnancy — causes fetal harm
Monitor kidney function and potassium levels regularly
Avoid potassium supplements or potassium-sparing diuretics

chemistry.halfLife: Losartan: 2 hours; Active metabolite EXP3174: 6–9 hours
chemistry.structureInfo: Losartan is an AT1 receptor antagonist that blocks angiotensin II-mediated vasoconstriction, aldosterone release, and sodium retention. Unlike ACE inhibitors, it does not increase bradykinin levels, avoiding the dry cough side effect. It is a prodrug partially converted to the more active metabolite EXP3174 by CYP2C9.
chemistry.formationInfo: Synthesized by Merck through structure-activity relationship studies on biphenyl imidazole scaffolds. The potassium salt improves aqueous solubility. DuPont chemists initially discovered the ARB class, and Merck developed losartan through extensive medicinal chemistry optimization.

Micropore Surgical Tape 1 inch.overview: 3M's paper-based hypoallergenic surgical tape for securing dressings, IV cannula tubing, nasogastric tubes, and medical devices to the skin. The non-woven paper backing tears easily without scissors and allows skin to breathe, minimizing maceration under the tape.
Micropore Surgical Tape 1 inch.instructions: 1. Ensure skin is clean and dry. 2. Cut or tear required length — tears easily by hand. 3. Secure the dressing by pressing firmly along all edges of the tape. 4. Smooth down completely to ensure good adhesion. 5. When removing, peel slowly back on itself parallel to the skin — do not pull upward.
warnings: Do not use over infected or broken skin
Remove slowly to avoid skin trauma — especially in elderly or fragile skin patients
Not for use as primary wound dressing

Flonase Nasal Spray.overview: Corticosteroid nasal spray for the long-term treatment of allergic and non-allergic rhinitis (hay fever). Reduces nasal inflammation, congestion, sneezing, and runny nose. Unlike antihistamines, Flonase addresses all nasal allergy symptoms and takes several days to reach full effect.
Flonase Nasal Spray.dosage: Adults and children over 12: 2 sprays in each nostril once daily. When controlled, reduce to 1 spray per nostril daily. Children 4–11 years: 1 spray per nostril once daily. Prime pump before first use.
sideEffects: Rarely: nasal septum perforation with long-term use
warnings: Do not use for acute sinusitis without medical advice
Contact with eyes can cause glaucoma with prolonged use
Full effect takes 1–2 weeks of consistent daily use

chemistry.bioavailability: ~1% nasal; extensive first-pass metabolism limits systemic effects
chemistry.structureInfo: Fluticasone propionate is a synthetic corticosteroid with very high glucocorticoid receptor affinity (18× greater than dexamethasone). Its high lipophilicity and extensive first-pass hepatic metabolism result in negligible systemic bioavailability from nasal administration, providing potent local anti-inflammatory action with minimal systemic steroid effects.
chemistry.formationInfo: Synthesized from 17α-hydroxyprogesterone through a multi-step steroid modification process. The S-fluoromethyl carbothioate group is critical for the drug's high receptor affinity and metabolic profile. Available as an aqueous suspension spray with microcrystalline cellulose and benzalkonium chloride.
